---
title: "Mestrando em Engenharia Civil"
description: "Sou mestrando em Engenharia Civil com foco em Geotecnia"
about: 
    template: trestles
    links:
        - icon: Linkedin
          text: LinkedIn
          url: www.linkedin.com/in/welkens-oliveira-362339263
        - icon: github
          text: Github
          url: https://github.com/Elkis13
image: aluno.jpg

---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
